error.title: Something went wrong
error.description: We could not load this page. Please try again.

home.title: Eyal's Coding Academy - Learn to Code
home.description: Master programming with Eyal's structured video courses. Browse our catalog and start learning today.

Home.title: Coding Academy
Home.description: A starter built on Next.js and Supabase. Sign in to start building, or jump straight in.
Home.body: Authentication, database, and edge functions are wired through Supabase. Press <kbd>d</kbd> anywhere to toggle dark mode.

hero.headline: Learn to Code with Expert-Led Video Courses
hero.subhead: Structured, beginner-friendly courses taught by Eyal. Go from zero to confident developer at your own pace.

structured.title: Structured Curriculum
structured.body: Each course follows a clear progression from fundamentals to real-world projects. No guesswork.

video.title: High-Quality Video
video.body: Professionally produced lessons you can watch at your own pace, rewind, and revisit any time.

practical.title: Practical Skills
practical.body: Every lesson is grounded in code you can actually use. Theory is kept to a minimum.

community.title: Supportive Community
community.body: Ask questions, share progress, and learn alongside fellow students on the same journey.

catalog.heading: Our Courses
catalog.subhead: Pick a course and start learning today.

empty.title: No Courses Yet
empty.body: New courses are added regularly. Check back soon!

error.title: Could Not Load Courses
error.body: We had trouble fetching the course catalog. Please try refreshing the page.

enrollError.signInRequired: Please sign in to enroll in a course.
enrollError.courseNotFound: This course is no longer available.

Auth.welcomeSubtitle: Sign in to your account, or create a new one.

AuthMessages.resetLinkInvalid: That reset link is invalid or has expired.
AuthMessages.updateFailed: Could not update your password. Please try again.

reviews.heading: Reviews

fields.title: Title
fields.slugHint: URL-safe identifier. Lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens only.

validation.slugInvalid: Slug may only contain lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens.
validation.slugTaken: A course with this slug already exists.
validation.coverImageInvalid: Cover image must be a valid URL.

deleteCourse.confirmBody: Are you sure you want to delete "{title}"? This will also delete all lessons. This action cannot be undone.

playlistImport.heading: Import from YouTube Playlist
playlistImport.missingKey: Playlist import requires a server-side YOUTUBE_API_KEY. Add the key to your .env.local file and restart the server.

validation.urlRequired: Please enter a YouTube playlist URL.
validation.urlInvalid: Invalid playlist URL. Could not extract a playlist ID.

playlistImport.error: Failed to import playlist. Please try again.
playlistImport.errorQuota: YouTube API quota exceeded or the API key is invalid. Please check your YOUTUBE_API_KEY and try again later.
playlistImport.errorNotFound: Playlist not found. It may be private, deleted, or the URL is incorrect.
playlistImport.noItems: The playlist appears to be empty.

reorder.error: Failed to save order. Please try again.

install.iosIntro: Add Coding Academy to your Home Screen for a full-screen, app-like experience.
install.iosStep1: Tap the Share button in Safari's toolbar.

email.subject: We miss you at Coding Academy!
email.body: We noticed you haven't visited us in a while. Come back and keep learning! {link}

Keep coding!
The Coding Academy Team

About.metaDescription: Learn about Eyal's Coding Academy: our mission to make coding approachable through structured, expert-led video courses.
About.heroSubtitle: We make learning to code approachable, structured, and genuinely enjoyable. (Placeholder copy - the full story is on its way.)
About.heroImageAlt: Placeholder for the About page hero image
About.missionBody: Eyal's Coding Academy exists to take you from your first line of code to building real projects with confidence. Every course is video-led, paced for beginners, and backed by an AI tutor that answers questions in context. (Placeholder copy.)
About.ctaSubtitle: Browse the full catalog and find a course that fits where you are today.

Contact.metaDescription: Get in touch with Eyal's Coding Academy. Send us a message or find our (demo) Tel-Aviv contact details.
Contact.title: Get in Touch
Contact.subtitle: Have a question about a course or your account? Send us a message and we'll get back to you.
Contact.mapAlt: Placeholder map showing the Tel Aviv office location
